name: ToolsIndex
desc: One Tool -> many entry points. A Tool UDT declares the callable; each adapter UDT exposes it in a different surface (CLI, HTTP API, MCP, structured logger, test harness).
flow: Tool <- CliAdapter (bin/acg)  /  Tool <- ApiAdapter (static JSON or HTTP)  /  Tool <- McpAdapter (MCP server)  /  Tool <- LoggerWrapper (JSONL sink)  /  Tool <- TestWrapper (pytest-style)
note: Guild tools live at guild/Enterprise/L3/tools/instances/. bin/acg is the CLI entry.
